com.pax.poslink

Class BatchResponse

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse<BatchResponse>
      • com.pax.poslink.BatchResponse

  • public class BatchResponse
extends BaseResponse<BatchResponse>
    Batch transaction response properties

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String AuthCode
      Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor
      java.lang.String BatchFailedCount
      Number of failed records during the BATCH uploading process for NON SAF trans.
      java.lang.String BatchFailedRefNum
      Transaction number for failed trans in terminal database during the BATCH uploading process for NON SAF trans.
      java.lang.String BatchNum
      Host returns batch number.
      java.lang.String CashAmount
      Cash transaction total amount
      java.lang.String CashCount
      Cash transaction total counts
      java.lang.String CashTipAmount
      Cash transaction tip amount
      java.lang.String CashTipCount
      Cash transaction tip counts

      CHECK transaction total amount

      CHECK transaction total counts

      java.lang.String CreditCount

      java.lang.String DebitTipCount

      EBT transaction total amount

      Gift transaction total counts
      java.lang.String GiftTipAmount
      Gift transaction tip amount
      java.lang.String GiftTipCount
      Gift transaction tip counts
      java.lang.String HostCode
      Payment processing host reference number
      java.lang.String HostResponse
      Payment processing host response
      java.lang.String HostSettledAmount
      Total amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.
      java.lang.String HostSettledCount
      Total Count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.
      java.lang.String HostSettledReturnAmount
      Total return amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.
      java.lang.String HostSettledReturnCount
      Return count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.
      java.lang.String HostTraceNum
      Host returns trace number.
      java.lang.String LoyaltyAmount
      Loyalty transaction total amount
      java.lang.String LoyaltyCount
      Loyalty transaction total counts
      java.lang.String LoyaltyTipAmount
      Loyalty transaction tip amount
      java.lang.String LoyaltyTipCount
      Loyalty transaction tip counts
      MerchantTotals MerchantTotals
      Totals for each MID and TID combination.

      Host returned error message.

      Merchant ID

      java.lang.String QRCodeTipCount

      Result code of transaction.
      java.lang.String ResultTxt
      Result Txt of transaction.
      java.lang.String SAFDeletedCount
      For DELETESAFFILE command, it stand for Total number of records deleted.
      java.lang.String SAFFailedCount
      Number of failed records during the uploading process
      java.lang.String SAFFailedTotal
      Number of total records in failed Database after the uploading process.
      java.lang.String SAFTotalAmount
      Total amount for all the new SAF records (exclude old records.
      java.lang.String SAFTotalCount
      For SAFUPLOAD command, it stand for Total number of new SAF records (exclude old records).
      java.lang.String SAFUploadedAmount
      Amount of successful approved uploaded records.

      Number of successful approved uploaded records.

      Terminal ID

      Time/date stamp of transaction

      Response TOR Information

    • Field Detail

      • ResultCode

        public java.lang.String ResultCode
        Result code of transaction.

        Attribute: ans6

        When code = 000000 means Approve. And other code means error.

        Used to determine results of transaction.

      • ResultTxt

        public java.lang.String ResultTxt
        Result Txt of transaction.

        Attribute: an…32

        See ResultCode & ResultTxt for definition.

      • CreditCount

        public java.lang.String CreditCount
        Credit transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

        Note:Doesn't contain void and auth transaction count

      • CreditAmount

        public java.lang.String CreditAmount
        Credit transaction total amount

        Attribute: var

        Note:Doesn't contain void and auth transaction amount, This is net deposit amount.

      • DebitCount

        public java.lang.String DebitCount
        Debit transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

      • DebitAmount

        public java.lang.String DebitAmount
        Debit transaction total amount

        Attribute: var

        Note:This is net deposit amount.

      • EBTCount

        public java.lang.String EBTCount
        EBT transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

        Include EBT_FOODSTAMP and EBT_CASHBENEFIT

      • EBTAmount

        public java.lang.String EBTAmount
        EBT transaction total amount

        Attribute: var

        Include EBT_FOODSTAMP and EBT_CASHBENEFIT

        Note:This is net deposit amount.

      • GiftCount

        public java.lang.String GiftCount
        Gift transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

      • GiftAmount

        public java.lang.String GiftAmount
        Gift transaction total Amount

        Attribute: var

        Note:This is net deposit amount.

      • LoyaltyCount

        public java.lang.String LoyaltyCount
        Loyalty transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

        This is net deposit amount.

      • LoyaltyAmount

        public java.lang.String LoyaltyAmount
        Loyalty transaction total amount

        Attribute: var

        Note:This is net deposit amount.

      • CashCount

        public java.lang.String CashCount
        Cash transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

      • CashAmount

        public java.lang.String CashAmount
        Cash transaction total amount

        Attribute: var

        Note:This is net deposit amount.

      • CHECKCount

        public java.lang.String CHECKCount
        CHECK transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

      • CHECKAmount

        public java.lang.String CHECKAmount
        CHECK transaction total amount

        Attribute: var

        Note:This is net deposit amount.

      • QRCodeCount

        public java.lang.String QRCodeCount
        QRCode transaction total counts

        Attribute: var

      • QRCodeAmount

        public java.lang.String QRCodeAmount
        QRCode transaction total amount

        Attribute: var

        Note:This is net deposit amount.

      • Timestamp

        public java.lang.String Timestamp
        Time/date stamp of transaction

        Attribute: n14

        The date time, YYYYMMDDhhmmss

      • TID

        public java.lang.String TID
        Terminal ID

        Attribute: ans…20

        If terminal id exists, this field is mandatory.

      • MID

        public java.lang.String MID
        Merchant ID

        Attribute: ans…20

        If merchant id exists, this field is mandatory.

      • HostTraceNum

        public java.lang.String HostTraceNum
        Host returns trace number.

        Attribute: ans…64

        Host returned trace number, if host returns it, this field is mandatory and suggest printing this on receipt.

        This usually holds the STAN or Sequence Number.

      • BatchNum

        public java.lang.String BatchNum
        Host returns batch number.

        Attribute: ans…32

        If host returns it, this field is mandatory.

      • AuthCode

        public java.lang.String AuthCode
        Returns the transaction auth code from the payment processor

        Attribute: ans…10

      • HostCode

        public java.lang.String HostCode
        Payment processing host reference number

        Attribute: ans…32

      • HostResponse

        public java.lang.String HostResponse
        Payment processing host response

        Attribute: ans…8

      • Message

        public java.lang.String Message
        Host returned error message. If host returns error message, this field is mandatory.

        Attribute: ans…255

      • ExtData

        public java.lang.String ExtData
        Catch all for additional transactional information.

        Extended data in XML format.

        <Line></Line>
        It is the line message return form POS terminal.
        And there may be several elements named "Line".

      • SAFTotalCount

        public java.lang.String SAFTotalCount
        For SAFUPLOAD command, it stand for Total number of new SAF records (exclude old records).

        Attribute: n…4

        Valid when the requested transaction = SAFUPLOAD

      • SAFTotalAmount

        public java.lang.String SAFTotalAmount
        Total amount for all the new SAF records (exclude old records.

        Attribute: n…8

        Valid when the requested transaction = SAFUPLOAD

      • SAFUploadedCount

        public java.lang.String SAFUploadedCount
        Number of successful approved uploaded records.

        Attribute: n…4

        Valid when the requested transaction = SAFUPLOAD

      • SAFUploadedAmount

        public java.lang.String SAFUploadedAmount
        Amount of successful approved uploaded records.

        Attribute: n…8

        Valid when the requested transaction = SAFUPLOAD

      • SAFFailedCount

        public java.lang.String SAFFailedCount
        Number of failed records during the uploading process

        Attribute: n…4

        Valid when the requested transaction = SAFUPLOAD, BATCHCLOSE, FORCEBATCHCLOSE

      • SAFFailedTotal

        public java.lang.String SAFFailedTotal
        Number of total records in failed Database after the uploading process.

        Attribute: n…4

        Valid when the requested transaction = SAFUPLOAD, BATCHCLOSE, FORCEBATCHCLOSE

      • SAFDeletedCount

        public java.lang.String SAFDeletedCount
        For DELETESAFFILE command, it stand for Total number of records deleted.

        Attribute: n…4

        Valid when the requested transaction = DELETESAFFILE

      • BatchFailedRefNum

        public java.lang.String BatchFailedRefNum
        Transaction number for failed trans in terminal database during the BATCH uploading process for NON SAF trans.

        Attribute: n…4

        Batch process is blocked and failed trans is still in normal database.

      • BatchFailedCount

        public java.lang.String BatchFailedCount
        Number of failed records during the BATCH uploading process for NON SAF trans.

        Attribute: n…4

        Batch process has not been blocked for failed uploading while failed trans has been moved to failed database.

      • TORResponseInfo

        public TORResponseInfo TORResponseInfo
        Response TOR Information
        See Also:
        TORResponseInfo

      • MultiMerchant

        public MultiMerchant MultiMerchant
        Response MultiMerchant
        See Also:

        Valid when requested transaction = BATCHCLOSE

      • HostSettledAmount

        public java.lang.String HostSettledAmount
        Total amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.

        Attribute: ans…256

      • HostSettledCount

        public java.lang.String HostSettledCount
        Total Count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in host message.

        Attribute: ans…256

      • HostSettledReturnAmount

        public java.lang.String HostSettledReturnAmount
        Total return amount for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.

        Attribute: ans…256

      • HostSettledReturnCount

        public java.lang.String HostSettledReturnCount
        Return count for all supported EDCs excluding Credit Void and Credit Auth transactions returned in the host message.

        Attribute: ans…256

      • TotalTax

        public TotalTax TotalTax
        Totals amount of tax for each tax type.
        See Also:

        Attribute: var

        Credit transaction tip amount

        Attribute: var
